final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI mockup for an e-commerce landing page hero section for a Japanese beauty brand.

Style/medium: clean flat UI design, feminine beauty brand aesthetic, soft and airy layout, web mockup with subtle floral accents
Composition: three-column hero layout with left text column, center model subject, right product display, generous whitespace, desktop viewport ratio
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
Scene/backdrop: soft gradient background transitioning from soft pink to white, delicate purple flowers as decorative accents, minimal and uncluttered
Lighting/mood: soft diffused lighting, bright and welcoming atmosphere, professional product photography feel
Color palette: soft pink as primary, white as base, purple flowers as accent, subtle gold highlights for stat cards
Materials/textures: smooth matte UI surfaces, clean vector icons, subtle shadows for depth
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must be a web UI mockup suitable for desktop viewing; text must be legible at mockup scale; layout must feel balanced with clear visual hierarchy
Avoid: cluttered composition, dark or moody lighting, masculine color schemes, overly decorative floral patterns, stock-photo generic faces, 8K stuffer words
